accurate.why: Correctly describes nullifying the IRS DeFi broker reporting rule (Dec 30, 2024); DeFi characterization is accurate context.

no_hallucinations.why: No invented claims; the rule title and date match the resolution.

states_purpose.why: States the purpose is to nullify the IRS digital-asset reporting rule.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Explains the CRA disapproval voids the rule so it has no force or effect.

exceptions_conditions.why: A bare CRA disapproval has no exceptions.

effective_dates.why: No timing provisions in the resolution.

major_provisions_covered.why: Captures the sole operative effect: rule has no force or effect.
